Definitions

Network
Two or more connected computers that can share resources such as data and applications, office machines, and Internet connection or some combination of these.
LAN
Local area network.
Workstation
Powerful computers that run more than one central processing unit(CPU) and whose resources are available to other users on the network to access when needed.
Client Machine
Any device on the network that can ask for access to resources like a printer or other hosts from a server or powerful workstation.
WAN
Wide area network.
TCP/IP
Transmission Control Protocol/Internet Protocol.
